title: Complaint
description: A national civic feed complaint with AI-generated satire.

_id.description: Unique ObjectId identifier for the complaint.

title.description: Brief headline of the civic issue.

description.description: Detailed description of the civic complaint.

rto_code.description: Regional Transport Office code identifying the district (e.g., MH-01, DL-01, KA-05).

image_url.description: URL of the uploaded photographic evidence.

ghibli_meme_url.description: Cloudinary delivery URL of the Gemini AI-generated Studio Ghibli art style illustration.

satire_text.description: AI-generated satirical commentary on the complaint.

upvotes.description: Number of upvotes received from citizens.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the complaint was submitted.
